---
title: "Recollections of Colonel de Gonneville"
sort_title: "by Charlotte Mary Yonge"
slug: "recollections of colonel de gonnevill"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---




#### Recollections of Colonel de Gonneville,  
published by his daughter, the Countess de Mirabeau,  
with an introductory sketch by General Baron Ambert.

#### Translated and edited from the French  
by Charlotte Mary Yonge.

#### Mirabeau, Marie (de Gonneville) comtesse de, 1829-  
Ambert, Joachim Marie Jean Jacques Alexandre Jules, 1804-1890.

#### Facsimile reprint of 1875 edition

#### Worley Publications 1988

#### ISBN: 1869804090. Set  
ISBN: 1869804104. Vol 1  
ISBN: 1869804112. Vol 2

#### Worley Publications (publishers of Napoleonic books and memoirs)  
10 Rectory Road East, Felling, Tyne and Wear, NE10 9DN, UK

*Telephone (00 44) 0191 469 2414*

#### Extensive text extracts from Gonneville's account of the Battle of Sagantum  
With maps and other additional military detail

#### [http://www.napitalia.org.uk/eng/sagns.shtml](http://www.napitalia.org.uk/eng/sagns.shtml)
